title: L&T Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: L&T Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
